User Story: As a sales rep, I want to create quotes quickly
Acceptance Criteria: Given an Account exists When I create an Opportunity And add a Quote Then the Quote should be linked to the Opportunity
Test Scenarios: From Account → Create opp → Create quote → Verify quote linked to opp

User Story: As a sales rep, I want to manage multiple quotes
Acceptance Criteria: Given an Opportunity with quotes When I mark a quote as Primary Then rollups should update
Test Scenarios: From Account → Create opp → Create quote → Create second quote → Mark Primary on first → Verify rollups

User Story: As a manager, I need to approve discounts
Acceptance Criteria: Given a Quote with discount over 20% When submitted for approval Then it should require manager approval
Test Scenarios: From Account → Create opp → Create quote → Add 25% discount → Submit for approval → Verify pending approval
